summary: All 14 acceptance criteria for the new Event Detail + per-event Notes feature pass. Backend: 8/8 new pytest cases pass (GET /api/schedule/{id} returns single event with no _id leak; GET notes public + sorted desc; POST notes returns 401 without token; POST with admin Bearer creates note with author=admin name, event_id, text, created_at; DELETE note returns {deleted:true} and 404 for unknown; PUT /api/schedule/{id} updates title/location/time/end_time/description and persists via GET; DELETE /api/schedule/{id} cascades and removes attached notes). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): tapping a session card navigates to /event/{id}; tapping bookmark INSIDE card toggles favorite WITHOUT navigating; detail page renders category pill (Social/Technical/etc.), title, day_label, time–end_time, location, About body, and Notes empty state 'Be the first to add a note.' / 'No updates yet for this session.'; logged-out users see NO edit pencil and NO composer; after logging in as dave.mackay/Chairman2026!, edit pencil + composer are rendered; posting a note shows it at top with author 'Dave Mackay' and a relative timestamp; admin trash icon deletes the note and empty state returns; edit pencil reveals editable fields (title, start time, end time, location, description, category chips) with Save/Cancel — Save calls PUT, updates the event in place, and exits edit mode; tapping a saved card on Profile/My Agenda navigates to /event/{id}. Only minor finding: clicking the modal-style /login route via direct URL emits a dev-only 'GO_BACK was not handled' warning when the auth context auto-dismisses with no history — does not affect users entering login from the Profile tab.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props -> use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents -> use style.pointerEvents. Cosmetic. Same as iteration_1.

action_items: Optional: in app/login.tsx, replace router.back() fallback with router.replace('/(tabs)/profile') when there is no navigation history, to silence the dev-only GO_BACK warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py delete_session cascades to event_notes_col correctly (line 385) — verified by test_delete_event_cascades_notes.
list_event_notes excludes _id via projection and sorts created_at desc — clean.
Frontend event/[id].tsx uses isAdmin = !!auth.username, which is correct for gating UI; admin-only API calls still re-verify via Bearer on the server.
Edit form lets user type free-form HH:MM into time/end fields — no input validation; user can save '99:99'. Low risk for admin-only authoring; consider client-side format check.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_event_detail_notes.py (new — covers all new endpoints + cascade + 401/404 edges)
seed_data_creation: None permanent. All TEST_ schedule items and notes created during tests were deleted in teardown. One leftover UI-created note from Playwright was removed via admin trash icon at end of testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` runs both suites in ~3s. UI flows can be re-verified by: open /, tap first session card -> /event/{id}, log in via Profile -> Admin sign-in, return to detail, post + delete a note, tap edit pencil, change title, Save -> should persist and exit edit. Bookmark + saved-card->detail navigation also confirmed end-to-end.
